component.name: dq.core
component.brief: Internal implementation of the data quality component.
component.description:
Contains NATS message handlers, repositories, service layer, and domain
logic for the data quality component. Depends on ores.dq.api for protocol
types. Implements handlers for change reasons, change reason categories,
origin/nature/treatment dimensions, catalogs, datasets, methodologies,
coding schemes, data domains, and subject areas.
